acceptance_targets: [chapter_01_craft_001] PASS if the revised dock exchange and closing resolve show all three of these on page in the targeted spans: one concrete bodily reaction to Tomas, one explicit interior thought tying his marriage or county access to Mina's desire, and one action or hesitation caused by that charge. FAIL if the passage still relies mainly on abstract labels like appetite, electrical charge, or humanized as the primary way of carrying the attraction.

[chapter_01_prose_001] PASS if each targeted passage is revised so that no two narration fragments appear back to back and every targeted beat is carried by at least one full sentence with an explicit subject and verb. FAIL if those passages still use cascades of clipped noun phrases or negation fragments as the main rhythmic device.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised dock exchange and closing resolve show all three of these on page in the targeted spans: one concrete bodily reaction to Tomas, one explicit interior thought tying his marriage or county access to Mina's desire, and one action or hesitation caused by that charge. FAIL if the passage still relies mainly on abstract labels like appetite, electrical charge, or humanized as the primary way of carrying the attraction.
findings.problem: The chapter's key desire-for-access thread with Tomas stays too tastefully interpretive at the exact point the premise wants compromising heat. Mina's reaction is repeatedly named in abstract shorthand instead of rendered through concrete bodily embarrassment, social risk, or self-disgust, which reads as timidity against the style bible's requirement to keep desire entangled with access and class pressure physically legible.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the Tomas beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:291, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:335, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:395, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:405, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:471 so Mina's attraction and opportunism show up as observable consequence. Replace at least two abstract labels with concrete body detail, a sharper thought about the wedding ring or county access, and one behavior change that makes the compromise feel embarrassing rather than neatly summarized.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each targeted passage is revised so that no two narration fragments appear back to back and every targeted beat is carried by at least one full sentence with an explicit subject and verb. FAIL if those passages still use cascades of clipped noun phrases or negation fragments as the main rhythmic device.
findings.problem: Narration repeatedly falls into clipped fragment cascades and negation shards. The pattern appears far more than twice, becomes a chapter-level tic, and violates the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration. Compression starts reading like stylized shorthand rather than controlled sentence music.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the fragment-heavy passages at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:149, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:151, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:153, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:245, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:265, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:459, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:463, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:469, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_01.md:471 into full grammatical narration with explicit subjects and verbs. Keep the pressure, but get it from syntax, diction, and paragraph control rather than back-to-back noun phrases or sentence fragments.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the book's uncomfortable overlaps: desire entangled with access, wonder contaminated by biotech history, class need shaping erotic choices, and ecological harm rendered at creature scale. When a scene sits on the edge between restraint and retreat, keep the pressure visible through bodies, residue, changed behavior, or social cost. If an exact detail would make the material more embarrassing, more sensual, or more morally compromising, that is usually the detail to keep.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, ecological damage, class shame, or moral compromise are softened into tasteful fog at the moment they should bite, the scene has failed and must be rewritten at higher specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken dialogue; uncontracted forms should signal deliberate emphasis, institutional performance, or a character-specific formality shift.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compression and dilation aggressively: single-scene nocturnes, comic paperwork chapters, quiet survey chapters, domestic weather chapters, confrontational set pieces, and aftermath chapters should sit beside each other without repeating the same rhythm two chapters in a row.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, coastal, and exact without brochure prettiness; scientific and bureaucratic terms may appear when the characters would think or speak through them, but they should stay embodied by consequence.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Mina Cordero, with free-indirect access tight enough to track bodily desire, shame, and observational obsession without collapsing into confessional summary
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple sentence music that can hold humidity, rot, and erotic charge, then cut hard into blunt compression at moments of humiliation, procedural friction, or ecological damage.
